---
title: "RegistrationResult"
generated: true
description: "Output of a registration recipe."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._core`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:RegistrationResult -->
```python
class RegistrationResult(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:RegistrationResult -->
Output of a registration recipe.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
